word: H165 - אֱהִי - ʼĕhîy - e-hee' - I will be

sections.paragraph:
אהי - 'ĕhı̂y - e-hee'

Apparently an orthographical variation for H346; where. (Used in Hos 13:10, Hos 13:14). “I will be” is often the rendering of the same Hebrew form from H1961: - I will be (Hos 13:10, Hos 13:14) [which is often the rendering of the same Hebrew form from H1961].
